coreIssue: This bi-weekly check-in is likely about helping a UX Lead make explicit tradeoffs between AZPocket App and CoE UX/UI demands.
openingQuestion: What tradeoff between AZPocket and CoE UX/UI feels most important to make explicit right now so you can lead both responsibly?
listenFor: whether he names one workstream first and treats the other as reactive or vague
whether he points to a specific decision owner, stakeholder, or dependency that is slowing both sides
if they describe what they need from you in concrete terms like priority calls, air cover, or stakeholder alignment
avoid: do not treat this like a personal time-management problem if the real issue is unclear ownership or competing asks
do not leave the meeting with both workstreams still framed as equally urgent without naming the tradeoff
goodOutcome: You and Carl have agreed which workstream gets lead-level attention first and what decision or stakeholder boundary you will reinforce so he can protect that scope.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one recent example where AZPocket and CoE UX/UI competed for Carl’s time so you can test the tradeoff with something concrete.
